name: 龙之谷（国服）
description: 经典无锁定ACT网游，以爽快打击感著称。国服运营近14年后停服。
epitaph: 不会消散的，是龙之谷冒险家们的羁绊。

name: Silent Hills
description: 小岛秀夫与伊藤润二联手打造，仅留下一个可玩demo(P.T.)便被Konami腰斩。
epitaph: 走不完的走廊，等不到的续作。

name: Nosgoth
description: 凯恩的遗产系列衍生非对称PVP游戏，吸血鬼vs人类。
epitaph: 诺斯高斯的战火，终究熄灭在无人问津的服务器中。

name: QQ堂
description: 腾讯经典休闲竞技游戏，泡泡堂式玩法，承载无数人的童年。
epitaph: 糖果色的战场，再也不会响起倒计时。

name: 星际争霸：幽灵
description: 以星际争霸为背景的第三人称动作射击游戏，开发多年后被取消。
epitaph: 幽灵特工Nova的任务，永远停留在了简报画面。

name: 冒险岛（旧版）

epitaph: 蘑菇仔还在，但那个世界已经变了。

name: Angry Birds Fight!
description:
On June 27, 2017, the official Facebook page of Angry Birds Fight! mentioned that the game will shut down the servers for the game in November. Later that day, the post was deleted, probably due to negative comments or it was early to post it.

On August 1, 2017, the game was hidden/removed from the App Store, silently being discontinued. However, the game could still be played by downloading it through other pages, or if the player had downloaded it before. On the same day, the Angry Birds' Twitter account mentioned the same message, same goes in-game. The post on Facebook was back up with the same message. Afterwards, the official Facebook account and Twitter accounts (both ENG and JP) of Angry Birds Fight! were deleted. The Walkthrough site was also shut down, as it hasn't been updated since February 2016. Daily Challenges were disabled following this.

On November 15, 2017, all servers for Angry Birds Fight! were shut down, essentially rendering the game completely unplayable. Attempting to start the game would result in a network error message on the title screen (it will always appear regardless of whether or not the WiFi and networks are actually working). 主页/存档链接：https://web.archive.org/web/20161224035410/https://www.angrybirds.com/games/angry-birds-fight/ 数据摘录自 Stop Killing Games Wiki「Dead game list」（https://stopkillinggames.wiki.gg/wiki/Dead_game_list），以 CC BY-SA 等维基许可为准。
epitaph: On June 27, 2017, the official Facebook page of Angry Birds Fight! mentioned that the game will shut down the servers…

name: Angry Birds Chrome
description:
The game was shut down on May 4, 2015, as announced in the AngryBirdsNest Update Log. The game is no longer accessible and is removed from the Chrome Webstore. The link now redirects you to the AngryBirdsNest homepage and you can't play it in the Chrome web browser even with caches.

Since its cancellation, various fans attempted to restore the game for browsers users. On April 24, 2020, the game was brought back via Flashpoint.[5] It was was fixed on February 5, 2022, and was playable on sandstormdev.indie.af, but with a broken UI.[6] The game also runs on an HTML5 engine instead of Flash, making it playable on mobile devices and most other platforms with HTML5 support.

As of sometime in early 2024, the website seems to be down for unknown reasons, although it still playable through the Wayback Machine. Later in February, another fan restoration was made on yell0wsuit.page (and is the only functional version of Angry Birds Chrome as of September 2025), Note: If you are using mobile devices to play this version you have to go on the main website to confirm the cookies pop-up, because the UI doesn’t work in the game link.

On March 2024, another fan restoration has been made on abchrome.epizy.com. As of September 2024, the domain has also closed.

name: Dungeon Siege (Online Multiplayer)
description:
Online multiplayer was disabled with Zonematch shutdown (see [https://www.mobygames.com/game/6088/dungeon-siege/ MobyGames trivia]).

Square Enix re-released DS1 on Steam at 2011-04-05 (see [https://steamdb.info/app/39190/info/ SteamDB]) but has removed both multiplayer functionality and the Legends of Aranna expansion.

Both had been restored by a [https://pastebin.com/Gcg9qLLp fan-made mod] by Killah. The restoration mod restores both the expansion as well as direct connection by IPv4 address, which requires a public IPv4 address and forwarded DirectPlay ports or the use of a tunneling solution. Zonematch is not usable. 主页/存档链接：https://web.archive.org/web/20060101132915/http://www.microsoft.com/games/dungeonsiege/ 数据摘录自 Stop Killing Games Wiki「Dead game list」（https://stopkillinggames.wiki.gg/wiki/Dead_game_list），以 CC BY-SA 等维基许可为准。
